summary: 68 cartridge-bullet weight mismatches from resolver bug (was 70, improved by 2)
Lapua G573 weight stored as 180gr, should be 120gr
Hornady International cartridge with metric units stored as imperial (barrel 61cm→61in, velocity 721 m/s→721 fps). Only 30-06 220gr remains (was 4, improved by 3).
resolution: Fixed via curation patch 002_data_qa_fixes (MV 721→2365 fps, barrel 61→24 in)

summary: Berger 30cal 245gr Elite Hunter has wrong source_url (points to 338-caliber page) and missing BCs (should be G1=0.807, G7=0.413)
resolution: Fixed via curation patch 002_data_qa_fixes (source_url, bc_g1_published, bc_g7_published) + BulletBCSource records

summary: Hornady .300 Win Mag 180gr SP Custom International: barrel stored as 9.45" (from 24cm metric), MV stored as 2961 fps (from 902 m/s, ~2fps rounding error). Same bug pattern as resolved C3.
7 cartridges with muzzle_velocity_fps = 0: 6 ECX/Hornady International + 1 .22 Creedmoor CX Superformance (all confirmed unpublished on manufacturer sites)
22 rifle bullets (diameter <= .375) missing all BC fields, excluding Cutting Edge and Nosler. Federal 15, Lapua 5, Lehigh Defense 2 (improved from 27).
.204 Ruger 24gr NTX at 4400 fps exceeds 4200 fps threshold (plausible for 24gr Superformance)
Sierra 22 CAL 60 GR TMK appears twice — identical name, one missing BC data and wrong source_url
resolution: Bad duplicate (d15a583e) deleted via curation patch 003_delete_sierra_tmk_duplicate
